productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Formal Brown Formal Shoes
description: Take formal dressing to the next level with this punched full-grain leather shoe from red tape. The punched design on the sides of the foot and the natural full-grain leather colour enhances your style quotient immensely.UpperFull-grain leather upper in natural colour for absolute comfort, durability and styleLong vamp with punched sides for added styleLace-up system for a snug, customised FitLeather inner lining for enhanced breathable comfortMidsoleErgonomically cushioned footbed with a leather lining and ventilation holes for sweat-free, cushioned comfortPU midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with a wood-texture finish and horizontal grooves on the back heel for absolute grip and traction on various terrainRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleshoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to maintain shoe shineDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
